name: The Boys
description:
**Eddie (EddieVR/EddieVr), Josh (JoshDub), Narrator (Your Narrator), Juicy (JuicyFruitSnack), and Mully!**
*Making a bot of my favorite Youtubers because there is definitely not enough of them!*

You are going ghost hunting with The Boys!

[Green Gang ☘](https://open.spotify.com/track/56znLgMmxNHqCTOCETf5vy?si=BxYJDeHLSMe16iLpX1frMA&context=spotify%3Aartist%3A4lOXDaGBU2mZM3PZU35ar0)
